mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.user_type AS userType, u.employee_id AS employeeId, u.status, e.deptment_id AS departmentId, d.dept_name AS departmentName, e.realname AS realName FROM users u LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = u.employee_id LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id WHERE u.id = #{id}
